message: 🌱 Add dify: Workflow Schedule Feature mission (#724)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dify-9168-workflow-schedule-feature",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dify: Workflow Schedule Feature",
+    "description": "Workflow Schedule Feature. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dify deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dify version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nhelm list -n dify 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dify installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dify configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dify configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl get configmap -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dify\n```\n### Self Checks\n\n- [X] I have searched for existing issues [search for existing issues](https://github.com/langgenius/dify/issues), including closed ones."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Workflow Schedule Feature",
+        "description": "Hi, . I'm [Dosu](https://dosu.dev), and I'm helping the Dify team manage their backlog. I'm marking this issue as stale.\n\n**Issue Summary**\n- You requested a workflow scheduling feature similar to \"cron\" jobs to automate tasks within the application.\n- The feature aims to enhance usability by removing the need for external tools like n8n.\n-  suggested using \"dify-schedule\" as a potential solution.\n- You inquired about the feature's inclusion in the roadmap, but the issue remains\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade dify to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade dify:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade dify dify/dify --namespace dify\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify\nhelm list -n dify\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dify -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dify\nkubectl get events -n dify --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Workflow Schedule Feature\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hi, . I'm [Dosu](https://dosu.dev), and I'm helping the Dify team manage their backlog. I'm marking this issue as stale.\n\n**Issue Summary**\n- You requested a workflow scheduling feature similar to \"cron\" jobs to automate tasks within the application.\n- The feature aims to enhance usability by removing the need for external tools like n8n.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
